title: Galaxblix
description: A small mod to bring more life, and expandability to a modded Skyblock Experience.
body:
GalaxBlix is a mod that brings multiple things to attempt to improve general improvement and progression to modded Skyblock.

The mod includes-

-Ways to craft obsidian to get access to the nether

-Ways to craft End Portal Frames to get access to the End

-4 new Tool sets, 3 new armor set (For now)

-1 new friend (In the form of a tamable mob)

-Many new recipes to get access to certain blocks, like deepslate, sand, and gravel!

-3 new armor sets (They are very basic, and will hopefully be bettered later on)

-2 new disks! (Short but Copyright free, go wild!)

-8 new blocks

-A new boss that locks a tool and armor set behind it!

-New projectile weapon like the trident!

-And much more to hopefully come later!

(! Disclaimer !)
This mod was made using a program called Mcreator, I'm not very talented at modding, but wished to create something people could enjoy, and I could enjoy, and edit for my runs of skyblock.
The reason this disclaimer is here is because mcreator is limited by the tools made available to me, like I could not edit the models, or textures for custom armors I made, so they are default like armor sets with a color difference (I apologize).
And I do not have access to making new trees or structures at the moment, but maybe if this gets enough love I'll learn to code and improve upon it!
